summary: `agt finalize` already closes the parent approval issue at finalize.mjs:133-138 via `closeIssue(freshState.approvalIssueNumber, ...)`. Added three tests to integration.test.mjs covering: successful finalize with approvalIssueNumber set (verifies state becomes 'completed', summary metrics, issuesClosed is a number), idempotency on second call, and rejection when tasks are not in terminal status.
